summary: Bot difficulty unlock system is working correctly. Backend APIs properly increment win counts, trigger unlocks at 3 wins, and award one-time BL bonuses. Frontend UI correctly displays unlock status and progress counters. All 16 backend tests pass.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - featured replays endpoint not implemented

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Bot battle result API correctly increments win counts per difficulty
VERIFIED: Medium Bot unlocks when easy_bot_wins >= 3
VERIFIED: Hard Bot shows progress counter (e.g., 2/3 medium wins)
VERIFIED: Unlock bonus fields present in API response (newly_unlocked_difficulty, unlock_bonus, message)
VERIFIED: Frontend BotDifficultySelector correctly uses botWinStats to show unlock status
VERIFIED: onGameComplete is called when game ends (not just on Play Again)
VERIFIED: Bot stats are refreshed after game completion via handleAuctionBattleComplete
MINOR: Featured replays endpoint returns 404 - not critical for bot battle functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bot battle unlock system fully functional. User test@blendlink.com has 9+ easy_bot_wins (medium unlocked), 3+ medium_bot_wins (hard unlocked). The onGameComplete callback is now called when game ends in BattleArena.jsx handleRoundComplete, not just on Play Again. Bot stats are refreshed via handleAuctionBattleComplete in PhotoGameArena.jsx.

bugs_fixed_by_main_agent.onGameComplete_only_on_play_again: FIXED - Now called in handleRoundComplete when game ends
bugs_fixed_by_main_agent.bot_stats_not_refreshing: FIXED - handleAuctionBattleComplete now calls /bot-battle/stats after recording result

mocked_apis.none: All APIs are real backend implementations
